## OPF vs UC/gSCR Comparison
- standard_opf_24h: objective=0.000000, max_system_residual=0.000000, max_branch_loading=92.260583
- uc_only_gmin_injected: objective=NaN, max_system_residual=NaN, max_branch_loading=NaN
- full_capexp_gmin_injected: objective=NaN, max_system_residual=NaN, max_branch_loading=NaN
- UC/CAPEXP integration path uses system-level active balance and does not expose branch/voltage physics; compare branch/voltage plausibility primarily on standard OPF.
- Injected g_min run became infeasible for at least one UC/gSCR mode; dispatch comparison to OPF is limited.

## Notes
- Storage simultaneous charge/discharge can occur under relaxed formulations; this is reported as a modeling limitation when detected.
- Startup/shutdown counts in relaxed UC are continuous block counts, not integer event counts.
